data.title: Behind the Scenes of Align Tech's Latest Options Trends
Fortinet Stock Is Rallying, But Is It Overbought Before Q4 Earnings?
data.description: Fortinet Inc to report Q4 earnings, with Wall Street expecting 61 cents EPS and $1.59B revenues. Stock up 54.65% in past year, bullish momentum ahead.

data.title: Trump Media Shares Are Trading Higher Today: What's Going On?
data.description: Trump Media & Technology Group (NASDAQ: DJT) shares are trading higher Thursday after the company announced it had registered trademarks for a series of investment vehicles under the Truth.Fi brand.

data.title: Peloton Q2 Beats On Sales, But JP Morgan Says Long-Term Growth Hinges On Subscriber Comeback
data.description: Peloton missed 2Q estimates, but analyst Doug Anmuth remains optimistic about FY25 guidance and potential growth under new CEO Peter Stern.

data.title: Calamos' New CPSF ETF Offers Growth With A Safety Net
data.description: Calamos Investments adds new structured protection ETF with downside risk buffer and FLEX options, providing risk-managed exposure to S&P 500.
